name: maintenance-tool-parent
description: Zentrale package.json für komfortable Entwicklungs- und Testskripte

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "backend,frontend,help" -c "blue,green,magenta" "mvn spring-boot:run -q" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run help:dev"
scripts.format: mvn spotless:apply && npm --prefix frontend run format:write
scripts.lint: mvn spotless:check && npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run format:check
